nasb.text: And He began to say to them, “Today this Scripture has been fulfilled in your hearing.”

esv.text: And he began to say to them, “Today this Scripture has been fulfilled in your hearing.”

cnv.text: 他就對他們說：“這段經文今天應驗在你們中間了。”

ccb.text: 祂就对他们说：“你们刚才听见的这段经文今天已经应验了。”

csbs.text: 耶稣开始对他们说：“今天，在你们耳中的这段经文，已经应验了。”
